message:
fix(ffs-fuse): fix compilation and clippy errors in FUSE adapter (bd-vgu)

The previous commit (f6b2ca8) referenced non-existent fuser::Config and
had unused imports. This fixes:
- Replace fuser::Config with Vec<MountOption> (fuser 0.16 API)
- Make cx_for_request() an associated fn (clippy::unused_self)
- Take &FfsError in reply_error_* helpers (clippy::needless_pass_by_value)
- Add #[must_use] to FrankenFuse::new
- Move test-only imports into #[cfg(test)] module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
